title: catapodium loliaceum
intro: Catapodium loliaceum, also known as Loliaceum grass or Rock Whitlow Grass, is a species of grass native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various ailments. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Catapodium loliaceum is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
